case_title: ANTHONY WILSON BELMONTE VS. JAMES BOYD et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOYD, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 PERRY STREET, UNIT NO. 333, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, PARKING, STORAGE AND COMMON AREAS $246.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $246.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER THAT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION BE ENTERED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOYD, JAMES DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
